𝗟𝗜𝗧𝗘𝗣𝗔𝗥𝗦𝗘 | Locally parsing PDF documents to extract text with spatial information and generate page screenshots, primarily for use in applications that require efficient document processing without external API calls or cloud services.  🔥 Super Hot!

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Locally parsing PDF documents to extract text with spatial information and generate page screenshots, primarily for use in applications that require efficient document processing without external API calls or cloud services.
📅 Created: Feb 2026 • Updated: Mar 2026

❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Fast Text Parsing using PDF.js
✅ Flexible OCR System (Tesseract.js built-in, HTTP server support)
✅ Screenshot Generation for LLM agents
✅ Multiple Output Formats (JSON, Text)
✅ Bounding Boxes for precise text positioning
✅ Standalone Binary with no cloud dependencies
✅ Multi-platform support (Linux, macOS, Windows)


❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖❖

🍴 135 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 5 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

LiteParse is a fast, lightweight, and open-source document parsing tool written in TypeScript. It focuses on local, high-quality spatial text extraction from PDFs, offering flexible OCR integration and screenshot generation without cloud dependencies. It's designed for efficient local processing, with an option to upgrade to LlamaParse for more complex documents.

Dyad is a local, open-source AI application builder that allows users to run AI models and applications directly on their machine. It prioritizes speed, privacy, and user control, offering an alternative to cloud-based services and enabling the use of personal API keys for various AI models.

𝗧𝗛𝗨𝗠𝗕𝗠𝗔𝗥𝗞𝗝𝗦 | Generating unique browser fingerprints for security purposes, such as preventing scams and spam, and detecting malicious traffic.  🔥 Super Hot!

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: Generating unique browser fingerprints for security purposes, such as preventing scams and spam, and detecting malicious traffic.
📅 Created: Dec 2023 • Updated: Mar 2026

✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧✧

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Free, open-source client-side JavaScript fingerprinting library
✅ Generates unique browser fingerprints
✅ Enhanced API version with server-side components
✅ Detects bots, VPNs, Tor, and datacenter traffic
✅ Provides threat level and uniqueness scoring
✅ Supports UMD, CommonJS, and ESM module formats
✅ Integrations for React and Vue in development

ThumbmarkJS is a free, open-source JavaScript library for browser fingerprinting, designed to generate unique identifiers for users. It offers both a client-side library for basic fingerprinting and an enhanced API version with server-side components for more robust detection of bots, VPNs, and threats, aiming to prevent scams and spam.

𝗠𝗚𝗥𝗘𝗣 | To provide a semantic, natural-language search interface for local files and web content, enhancing developer productivity and AI agent capabilities.  🔥 Super Hot!

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

𝗧𝗘𝗖𝗛 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗖𝗞: 📘 TypeScript 
🎯 𝗨𝗦𝗘 𝗖𝗔𝗦𝗘: To provide a semantic, natural-language search interface for local files and web content, enhancing developer productivity and AI agent capabilities.
📅 Created: Nov 2025 • Updated: Mar 2026

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

✨ 𝗞𝗘𝗬 𝗙𝗘𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗘𝗦 ✨

✅ Natural-language search
✅ Semantic, multilingual, and multimodal search capabilities
✅ Built-in web search (`--web` flag)
✅ Background indexing with `mgrep watch`
✅ Device-login flow and coding agent integrations
✅ Reduced token usage for agents
✅ Support for code, text, and PDFs (audio/video coming soon)


◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📊 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗦𝗧𝗔𝗧𝗦

⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.9K 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗿𝘀
🍴 160 𝗳𝗼𝗿𝗸𝘀
🔍 36 𝗼𝗽𝗲𝗻 𝗶𝘀𝘀𝘂𝗲𝘀

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

📝 𝗔𝗕𝗢𝗨𝗧 𝗧𝗛𝗜𝗦 𝗣𝗥𝗢𝗝𝗘𝗖𝗧

mgrep is a command-line tool that enables semantic searching across various file types, including code, text, and PDFs, by indexing them locally. It offers natural language querying, web search integration, and background indexing for continuous updates, making it suitable for both human developers and AI agents.

◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉◉

Kraken is a Python-based toolkit designed to centralize and streamline various brute-force attack operations. It offers a unified interface for cybersecurity professionals to perform brute-force attacks against a wide range of network services and web applications.
